gitCommit.subject: fix(db): BUG #1 — sync all missing DB migrations + fix all security/perf advisors (#670)
gitCommit.body:
fix(db): BUG #1 — sync all missing DB migrations + fix all security/perf advisors (#670)

* docs: update Motor V2 test report — mark BUG #2/#3/#4 as FIXED

- BUG #2 (missing migration versions): registered via 20260605110225 migration
- BUG #3 (race condition / batch spam): fixed via advisory lock (previously merged)
- BUG #4 (parent_key_source gaps): all 3 suppliers now configured
- Updated BUG #1 scope from 28 to 78+ missing migrations
- Replaced recommendations section with corrective action status table

https://claude.ai/code/session_0129PXBjWD9YgNFvnnH7p93j

* chore(db): export missing migrations to repo + fix all RLS/security advisors (BUG #1)

## Migration files added (54 files)

### Category B — Bronze/Silver pipeline (reconstructed from DB statements)
- 20260601180000: fix collections RLS add select policy for authenticated
- 20260602112505: fix v_products_public add set_image_url v2
- 20260603215516–20260603215700: raw landing phase 1–3 (status provenance, coherence trigger, content hash, queue indexes)
- 20260603221755–20260603231511: silver_01–12 (locked fields, padronizacao, promoção soberana, padronizador bronze→silver, variantes, equivalência cor, padronizador variantes, promoção variantes, custo XBZ/Asia, etc.)
- 20260604002342–20260604111250: silver_13–16 (extrator cor, variante cor título, orquestrador promoção lote, fix log price change, sementes cores, derive parent XBZ/Asia)

### Category C — Security/performance fixes (new migrations)
- 20260605150000: register repo versions in DB (BUG #2 fix)
- 20260605160000: fix images_status consistency — backfill 11,529 stale pending rows
- 20260605161000: fix RLS disabled on 2 tables + mutable search_path on 5 functions
- 20260605162000: fix auth_rls_initplan — 23 policies across 8 tables
- 20260605163000: fix remaining auth_rls_initplan (9) + multiple_permissive_policies (18)
- 20260605164000: fix security_definer_view on 2 views (ALTER VIEW SET security_invoker=on)

## Advisor status after these migrations
- Security ERRORs: 0 (was 4)
- auth_rls_initplan WARNs: 0 (was 32)
- multiple_permissive_policies WARNs: 0 (was 18)
- Remaining: only INFO-level unindexed FKs / unused indexes / no PK on backup tables

https://claude.ai/code/session_0129PXBjWD9YgNFvnnH7p93j

* fix(security): revoke overly-broad grants on internal tables and function

Removes PUBLIC EXECUTE grant from enforce_password_reset_rate_limit()
(explicit anon/authenticated/service_role grants remain). Revokes anon
SELECT from 15 internal/staging tables to eliminate pg_graphql_anon_table_exposed
WARNs; data was already protected by RLS with zero anon policies.

https://claude.ai/code/session_0129PXBjWD9YgNFvnnH7p93j

* chore(migrations): sync 29 more DB-only migration files to repo

Reconstructed SQL for Category C versions covering SPR v2 pipeline
fixes (fn_process_raw_v2 integer cast, failed status, content hash),
bronze versioning trigger, silver padding/backfill, FK on-delete
policies, security hardening (revoke anon/authenticated EXECUTE on
fn_process_raw_v2), vacuum cron fix, and RLS hardening for mcp_sessions,
silver price tiers, physical, and dry-run ACL.

https://claude.ai/code/session_0129PXBjWD9YgNFvnnH7p93j

* chore(migrations): sync 3 more DB-only migration files to repo

Reconstructed SQL for silver safebool/purge/colormatch/dryrun/lockedfields
fix, supplier_price_tiers check constraints, and sync active/is_active
in fn_promote_padronizacao (Category C versions).

https://claude.ai/code/session_0129PXBjWD9YgNFvnnH7p93j

* chore(db): export 3 final missing DB migrations to repo (BUG #1 fix)

Adds the last 3 migration files that existed in the DB but were absent
from the repo, completing the full set of 91 missing migrations:

- 20260605105733_fn_process_raw_v2_bugfix_sku_and_retry_filter
- 20260605110327_drop_dead_code_variant_functions
- 20260605110337_fix_supplier_settings_parent_key

https://claude.ai/code/session_0129PXBjWD9YgNFvnnH7p93j

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

gitCommit.body:
fix(db): BUG #1 — sync all missing DB migrations + fix all security/perf advisors (#670)

* docs: update Motor V2 test report — mark BUG #2/#3/#4 as FIXED

- BUG #2 (missing migration versions): registered via 20260605110225 migration
- BUG #3 (race condition / batch spam): fixed via advisory lock (previously merged)
- BUG #4 (parent_key_source gaps): all 3 suppliers now configured
- Updated BUG #1 scope from 28 to 78+ missing migrations
- Replaced recommendations section with corrective action status table

https://claude.ai/code/session_0129PXBjWD9YgNFvnnH7p93j

* chore(db): export missing migrations to repo + fix all RLS/security advisors (BUG #1)

## Migration files added (54 files)

### Category B — Bronze/Silver pipeline (reconstructed from DB statements)
- 20260601180000: fix collections RLS add select policy for authenticated
- 20260602112505: fix v_products_public add set_image_url v2
- 20260603215516–20260603215700: raw landing phase 1–3 (status provenance, coherence trigger, content hash, queue indexes)
- 20260603221755–20260603231511: silver_01–12 (locked fields, padronizacao, promoção soberana, padronizador bronze→silver, variantes, equivalência cor, padronizador variantes, promoção variantes, custo XBZ/Asia, etc.)
- 20260604002342–20260604111250: silver_13–16 (extrator cor, variante cor título, orquestrador promoção lote, fix log price change, sementes cores, derive parent XBZ/Asia)

### Category C — Security/performance fixes (new migrations)
- 20260605150000: register repo versions in DB (BUG #2 fix)
- 20260605160000: fix images_status consistency — backfill 11,529 stale pending rows
- 20260605161000: fix RLS disabled on 2 tables + mutable search_path on 5 functions
- 20260605162000: fix auth_rls_initplan — 23 policies across 8 tables
- 20260605163000: fix remaining auth_rls_initplan (9) + multiple_permissive_policies (18)
- 20260605164000: fix security_definer_view on 2 views (ALTER VIEW SET security_invoker=on)

## Advisor status after these migrations
- Security ERRORs: 0 (was 4)
- auth_rls_initplan WARNs: 0 (was 32)
- multiple_permissive_policies WARNs: 0 (was 18)
- Remaining: only INFO-level unindexed FKs / unused indexes / no PK on backup tables

https://claude.ai/code/session_0129PXBjWD9YgNFvnnH7p93j

* fix(security): revoke overly-broad grants on internal tables and function

Removes PUBLIC EXECUTE grant from enforce_password_reset_rate_limit()
(explicit anon/authenticated/service_role grants remain). Revokes anon
SELECT from 15 internal/staging tables to eliminate pg_graphql_anon_table_exposed
WARNs; data was already protected by RLS with zero anon policies.

https://claude.ai/code/session_0129PXBjWD9YgNFvnnH7p93j

specs.title: 93 · Login com credenciais inválidas permanece em /login
94 · RLS bloqueia leitura de tabelas sensíveis para o usuário comum
clique em 'Continuar com Google' dispara authorize com provider=google
/auth/callback com code válido troca por sessão e autentica usuário
/auth/callback com ?error= mostra hint detalhado e código do erro
mostra erro para link inválido (sem token)
renderiza formulário quando há token no hash
valida força da senha e critérios em tempo real
